# iBločky

> iPhone aplikácia na skenovanie a archiváciu bločkov s exportom do účtovného softvéru Pohoda. Voliteľný Windows Companion automaticky importuje doklady do Pohody. Vyrobené na Slovensku spoločnosťou Ereska Apps.

iBločky is an iPhone app for scanning and archiving receipts (bločky) with export to the Slovak accounting software Pohoda. An optional Windows Companion automatically imports the documents into Pohoda. Made in Slovakia by Ereska Apps.

Pricing: Zadarmo (Free, €0), Pro (€2.99), Pro Max (€14.99). The Windows Companion is free.

## Pages
- [Domov / Home](https://iblocky.sk/): Landing page — iPhone app features, pricing, Pohoda export, Windows Companion overview, FAQ.
- [Stiahnuť / Download](https://iblocky.sk/download.html): Windows Companion download, system requirements (Windows 10/11), and setup guide.
- [Ochrana súkromia / Privacy Policy](https://iblocky.sk/privacy.html): What data is collected and how it is protected.
- [Podmienky použitia / Terms](https://iblocky.sk/terms.html): Subscription, refund, and usage terms.
